description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the ruby:2.1.4 Docker image and runs a before_script that installs bundler with gem install bundler --no-document and then runs bundle install --jobs $(nproc) "${FLAGS[@]}". Define two jobs in the default test stage: an rspec job that executes bundle exec rspec, and a rubocop job that executes bundle exec rubocop. No caches, artifacts, or special rules are configured.
